name: City of Converging Stars
description: When the wearer uses Follow-Up ATK, increases ATK by 24% for 2 turns. When an enemy target gets defeated, increases CRIT DMG for all allies by 12% in the current battle. This effect cannot stack.

pieces2.description: When the wearer uses Follow-Up ATK, increases ATK by 24% for 2 turns.

pieces4.description: When an enemy target gets defeated, increases CRIT DMG for all allies by 12% in the current battle. This effect cannot stack.
